name: Double Masters

draft.notes: Two rares AND two foils per pack: 8 commons + 3 uncommons + 2 rares + 2 foils + ad card. Two foils come from different sheets in fixed order; cannot get two rare or two mythic foils, but a rare+mythic foil is possible. Empirical foil rarity (both slots): 1108/1534 common, 350 uncommon, 69 rare, 7 mythic.

statedRates: Empirical foil rarity across both foil slots: 1108/1534 common, 350/1534 uncommon, 69/1534 rare, 7/1534 mythic.
sourceNotes: Double Masters: unusual structure with 2 rare slots and 2 foil slots per pack. Printed USA and Belgium. 24 packs per box. Showcase variants seeded into uncommon runs. Sheet arrangement shared with VIP edition.
